20260518a: 🐺 AnimalQuest multiplayer launched — full port of PlateQuest's pack-based gameplay re-themed for wildlife spotting.
🎯 423-species database — wild North American animals plus 120 global zoo creatures.
💬 Public + private chat, praise reactions, taunts, announcements.
🛒 Shop with re-themed tricks (Predator Alert, Stampede, Poacher, Burrow, etc.) and coins.
🏆 Achievements, badges, streak bonuses, first-finder claims, bounties, secret targets.
📍 GPS-based regional rarity coming next — for now, regional tagging from data.js applies.
